title: Decision No. 43 of 2022 Determining Technical and Organisational Measures for Personal Data Protection
summary: Requires technical and organisational controls, including processor and third-party contractual safeguards, and directs controllers to align external processor or third-party arrangements with the cross-border transfer decision.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Requires safeguards relevant to transfers and third-party processing.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Personal-data security measures decision under Bahrain’s PDPL.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Requires breach handling and PDPA notification for personal data incidents.
theme_notes.digital_health.health_data: Technical and organisational security measures for personal data including health data.

notes: Related instruments: Law No. 30 of 2018 and Decision No. 42 of 2022
